evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that weather conditions (temperature, precipitation, wind) are auto-captured. While the linked use case mentions that weather was auto-logged as '68°F, clear', it does not provide evidence for capturing precipitation and wind conditions, which are also part of the requirement. This indicates a gap in the implementation as the requirement is not fully covered.
gaps: No evidence of precipitation and wind conditions being auto-captured.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
